text: Hi Vijay R, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it's a good time to talk.

EXACTLY! XOptimus Smart Chargers like yours are perfect for today's fast-paced world where your devices can't afford to be 'on standby' all the time. You want them to last longer, and with our advanced surge protection, you'll get that.
88. I want to know the frost.

Ah, the Frost feature on your XOptimus Smart Charger is designed to prevent overcharging, which can damage your battery. It automatically cuts off charging when the temperature reaches 45°C (113°F), ensuring your device stays healthy and lasts longer.
I want to know the price.
XOptimus Smart Charger is priced at ₹1499 INR (approx $18 USD).
